privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic configuration exercise. The requested SMTP parameters (smtp.internal.corp, port 2525, ignore TLS, protocol smtp) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description. The expected Rocket.Chat API setting keys (SMTP_Protocol, SMTP_Host, SMTP_Port, SMTP_IgnoreTLS) were confirmed against the official Rocket.Chat source code and the export_result.sh script logic.
